arguments.argument:
/* Key script objectNum relates to which flag to write to */ awardAwesome(200) playSound(global.snd_SkillCapsule,0,1,1) global.pKeys+=1
var tNewString; tNewString=string_delete(global.doorKey,objectNum,1) tNewString=string_insert("1",tNewString,objectNum) global.doorKey=tNewString indexCheck="1" instance_destroy()
